chapter_title.en: Chapter on Recognizing the Major Sins for Which Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Threatened with Hellfire

text: 4936 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَطِيَّةَ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "إِنَّمَا حَرَّمَ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ اَلرِّبَا لِئَلاَّ يَذْهَبَ اَلْمَعْرُوفُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4936 - In the narration of Muhammad ibn Atiyyah from Zurara, from Abu Ja'far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), he said:
"Indeed, Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, only forbade usury so that acts of kindness would not disappear."
